(Amended) Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Or In The Alternative Motion For An Order Imposing Issue And Evidentiary Sanctions, And For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Mar-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Matt McFarland, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Cathy Helton, Jesse Helton
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiffs Cathy Helton, Jesse Helton's Motion For Terminating Sanctions, or in the alternative, Motion For An Order Imposing Issue and Evidentiary Sanctions, And For Monetary Sanctions is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as it seeks additional monetary sanctions. Sanctions are awarded against Defendants in the amount of $1,540, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compell Responses To Pltfs Interrogatories And Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
MATT MCFARLAND, ESQ.(TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC), (415)771-9850, FOR Plaintiffs/MOVING PARTIES, Cathy Helton, Jesse Helton
JONATHAN HERSCHEL BORNSTEIN, ESQ., (415)409-7611, FOR DEFENDANTS/OPPOSING PARTIES, ELIZABETH RAYNAL, ET. AL.

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiffs Cathy Helton, Jesse Helton's Motion To Compel Defendants' Responses To Plaintiffs' Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $490, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED (EAH/612)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Defendnats' Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Prod. Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
MATT MCFARLAND, ESQ.(TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC), (415)771-9850, FOR Plaintiffs/MOVING PARTIES, Cathy Helton, Jesse Helton
JONATHAN HERSCHEL BORNSTEIN, ESQ., (415)409-7611, FOR DEFENDANTS/OPPOSING PARTIES, ELIZABETH RAYNAL, ET. AL.

RULING:
THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiffs Cathy Helton, Jesse Helton's Motion To Compel Defendants' Responses To Plaintiffs' Request For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond and to produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $490, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED (EAH/612)

JONATHAN HERSCHEL BORNSTEIN, ESQ., (415)409-7611, FOR DEFENDANTS/OPPOSING PARTIES, ELIZABETH RAYNAL, ET. AL.
